title: --debug "Internal Error" on develop-v5 on BlackParrot
body:
Hi, I am seeing a regression on develop-v5. Curiously, the actual build and execution of a simulation works fine. However, using --debug to try to debug an unrelated issue causes a ~segfault~ "Internal Error" during verilation. Unfortunately, I don't have time currently to shrink the testcase

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

To reproduce:

```
git clone -b dev git@github.com:black-parrot/black-parrot
cd black-parrot
git submodule update --init external/
# Apply this patch

diff --git a/bp_common/syn/Makefile.verilator b/bp_common/syn/Makefile.verilator
index 50154a31..6cba9d59 100644
--- a/bp_common/syn/Makefile.verilator
+++ b/bp_common/syn/Makefile.verilator
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ VV ?= $(VERILATOR)
 VERILATOR_THREADS ?= 1
 ## Tool options
 VV_OPTS  = --cc                 # Output in C++
-#VV_OPTS += --debug --gdbbt     # Debugs and produces stack trace
+VV_OPTS += --debug --gdbbt     # Debugs and produces stack trace
 VV_OPTS += -O1
 VV_OPTS += --x-assign fast --x-initial fast
 VV_OPTS += --threads $(VERILATOR_THREADS)

make -C bp_top/syn clean build.sc

Result:
%Error: Internal Error: ../V3OrderGraph.h:84: Must not be null
-vertex: 0x5555cf910630
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
- V3Ast.cpp:1108:     Dumping obj_dir/Vtestbench_990_final.tree
- V3StatsReport.cpp:220:statsReport: 
%Error: Internal Error: Aborting since under --debug

```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

develop-v5

What OS and distribution are you using?

Ubuntu 20.04

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

I'm happy to try out solutions, but have little time to debug myself for the next month or so
